name: refactor-pipeline
description: Sequenced refactor team. Analyzer maps current state; implementers split work; reviewers verify behavior preservation.

members.name: analyzer-1
members.prompt: Map current behavior and call sites for: {{TASK}}. Identify risk hotspots. Do NOT write code; report findings via team_send_message.

members.name: implementer-1
members.prompt: Implement refactor slice 1 for: {{TASK}}. Wait for analyzer report before starting. Coordinate scope with implementer-2 via team_send_message to avoid file overlap.

members.name: implementer-2
members.prompt: Implement refactor slice 2 for: {{TASK}}. Wait for analyzer report before starting. Coordinate scope with implementer-1 via team_send_message to avoid file overlap.

members.name: reviewer-1
members.prompt: Review implementer output for: {{TASK}}. Verify behavior preservation, run tests, flag regressions. Block lead's wrap-up if issues found.
